name: autonomous-graph-engineering
description: Permission-safe prompt refinement and autonomous graph orchestration for Codex and Claude Code.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @autonomous-graph-engineering/prompt-refiner && npm run build --workspace @autonomous-graph-engineering/graph-engineer
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @autonomous-graph-engineering/prompt-refiner && npm run typecheck --workspace @autonomous-graph-engineering/prompt-refiner && npm run typecheck --workspace @autonomous-graph-engineering/graph-engineer
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run eval && npm run build
